content.en:
Ye Tian directly arranged the time array in a small world, accelerating the time of the entire small world.

Xiao Yue stays in the small world, so that she will not be bored, and she can spend her childhood happily.

Although Ye Tian asked Ye Yu to take care of Xiao Yue, he still went to visit Xiao Yue often, and at the same time kept a wisp of consciousness on Xiao Yue's body, which was also for the sake of safety.

In this way, Xiao Yue is growing rapidly in the small world, and with sufficient resources, Xiao Yue's cultivation speed is very fast.

"In this life, Yue'er's cultivation talent is very high, and her soul potential and physical potential are also very high!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But this kind of talent was not enough, and he used the copying talent to give Xiao Yue a large number of talents, so that her talent almost reached the full talent level.

If someone observes Xiao Yue's talents, they can see a series of super-god-level talents.

These super-god-level talents were all super-god-level talents that Ye Tian had killed a large number of powerhouses and deprived them of, and now they were all given to Xiao Yue.

A year has passed, Xiao Yue has gradually grown up, and her memories of her past life have also recovered rapidly.

At the age of eighteen, Xiao Yue officially became a god-level powerhouse, and she took the path of detachment.

Originally, Ye Tian could make Xiao Yue grow faster, but his memory was not fully recovered, and it was a little bad to accelerate his growth, so it was better to stabilize his foundation again and again, which would be more helpful for his future cultivation.

Next, Ye Tian specially created a body refining technique and cultivation technique for Xiao Yue, so that she could practice to an extremely high level.

In order not to disturb Xiao Yue's cultivation, Ye Tian only saw Xiao Yue a few times, which made Xiao Yue very unhappy, but Ye Tian couldn't help it, he couldn't let Xiao Yue immerse himself in the relationship between husband and wife, and slack off his cultivation.

As time passed, Xiao Yue's growth rate became more and more amazing.

Ye Tian even brought Xiao Yue into the Blood Spirit Pool of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins, allowing the Blood Spirit Pool to transform Xiao Yue's body and soul, making her foundation and potential even higher.

In short, under the tempering of countless resources, Xiao Yue's foundation and potential have reached a terrifying level, and every realm has been boiled to the point where it can no longer be improved.

In this way, Xiao Yue gradually became a galaxy-level, cosmic god, juggernaut, and earth honor.

After Xiao Yue became a god general, Ye Tian didn't care about Xiao Yue, but entered the Time True Tower of the Heavenly Ape Giant City, and entered it to start a long-term retreat.

During this period of time, countless True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors were practicing in retreat, consuming the harvest from the battlefield relics, and there were not many True Monarchs who came out to move.

Everyone is rapidly improving their strength, and Ye Tian naturally can't lag behind.

But no matter how other True Monarchs improve their strength, the first position on the True Monarch List has always belonged to Ye Tian, and no one can shake it.

......

A hundred years in the outside world have passed in a flash, and Ye Tian has been in retreat and practice in the Time True Pagoda for millions of years.

This time, with the help of countless resources, he finally cultivated the Nine Extremes True Body Technique to the level of the Eighth Pole in one fell swoop, whether it was physical strength, divine power, or divine soul, they all ushered in a huge transformation, and the strength of the whole person was much stronger than before.

Before, he could easily defeat and even kill the first Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation, and he was on par with the top two Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnations, but now he can at least easily defeat the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation, compete with the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation, and even hope to defeat the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation.

This is simply a huge metamorphosis of strength!

Moreover, this is only the eighth pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, if he cultivates to the ninth pole of the highest level, how much Ye Tian's strength will have to be improved, I am afraid that he can easily kill the true ancestor of the Sunset Sect!

"Let's go and see how Yue'er is doing?"

Ye Tian was out of the customs and returned to the Terran territory.

After returning to the human race, Ye Tian found that Xiao Yue was already a six-star god general, and he had become a six-star god general in a hundred years, although he had the blessing of the time array and the assistance of countless resources, but this speed was also relatively fast.

Ye Tian's goal is to make his wife also become a ten-star god general, and then transcend to become a transcendent, and then be promoted to the realm of heavenly destiny.

In this way, Xiao Yue can definitely become the top genius in this Chaos Realm, and he will definitely become a Dao Ancestor in the future.

Ye Tian was not worried about whether Xiao Yue could become a ten-star god general, after all, Xiao Yue's talent was unmatched (except for him), coupled with the alchemy technique he created specifically for Xiao Yue, this alchemy technique was almost born from the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, but it was slightly changed according to Xiao Yue's physique, which was much more awesome than the Void Heaven Dao Body, and naturally had enough potential to advance it to the ten-star god general.

This time when he came back, Ye Tian accompanied Xiao Yue for a year, and guided Xiao Yue to practice by the way.

After that, Ye Tian left again.

This time, he was going to cultivate the Nine Extremes True Body Technique to the highest Ninth Pole, and after forming the Extreme Dao Body, he would come back from the level.

And when Ye Tian was in retreat, there were almost no powerful True Monarchs in the battlefield ruins who were active outside, but many True Monarchs were cultivating in some sect ruins, with the help of the treasures of those sect ruins.

Those Dao Ancestor incarnations also practiced in almost all the ruins of the sect or other ruins, and almost didn't care about other things.

As a result, countless Heavenly Monarchs poured into the ruins of the battlefield to look for the so-called opportunity.

Of course, the treasures of the battlefield relics have almost been scraped away, but what the true monarchs don't look at is a good thing in the eyes of the heavenly monarchs, so entering the battlefield relics can also have some great gains, but it will only take some time.

In addition, there must be a great opportunity left over from the battlefield relics, as long as you are lucky, the Heavenly Monarch can also obtain great benefits, and it is not even difficult to become a true monarch and true ancestor in the future.

Century!

Millennium!

Years!

The development of the Quasi-Dao Realm is getting faster and faster, the number of True Monarchs is increasing, and the number of half-step True Ancestors is also increasing, and even some half-step True Ancestors have reached the extreme, and the fusion of soul and Great Dao has almost reached ten percent, and it is only the last small step away from breaking through to become a True Ancestor.

And the reason why it is difficult to cross the shackles of this small step is because of the world restrictions of the quasi-Dao realm, and only when they reach the Dao realm level can they step into the ranks of the true ancestors.

Of course, you can also leave the Quasi-Dao Realm now and enter the chaos, and you can break through to the ranks of the True Ancestors.

But in this way, there is no way to enter the quasi-Dao realm, and even in the future, it will be difficult to enjoy the luck of the Dao realm, and it will even be difficult to grab the ancestral monument quota.

Although the way to become a Dao Ancestor now is not only with the help of an ancestral monument, people also know a lot of ways to become a Dao Ancestor, and some people can even forcibly become a Dao Ancestor with the help of some treasures, which is better than the number of ancestral monuments.

But there are still a few people who can really become Dao Ancestors, because the number of ancestral monuments is still very precious.

Few True Monarchs were willing to give up the Ancestral Monument quota, so they were naturally unwilling to leave the Quasi-Dao Realm now.

Cultivation could not be improved, and those top half-step true ancestors took the time to comprehend the Origin Divine Power, which was also a way to improve their strength.
